series_metadata.series_description: Includes, but is not limited to: documents pertaining to agency budget narratives, expenditure justifications, executive budget proposals, spending authority adjustments, and all other materials relating to the development of the agency''s requested budget, actual budget, and specific budget issues.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created. ; Electronic: Retain four (4) years after close of fiscal year in which created., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
